description_long: This object is a rectangular, upright electronic device with a predominantly white exterior and a black rear panel. The front face features a subtle Xbox logo in the upper right corner and a perforated section likely for ventilation or speaker output. The right side is equipped with multiple ports, including Ethernet, HDMI, USB, and power connections, indicating its function as a gaming console or media device. The back panel is solid black with four small feet at the corners, providing stability. The left side has a vertical slot, likely for disc insertion, a power button, and another Xbox logo, suggesting this is an Xbox Series S or similar console. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a mix of matte and slightly textured surfaces.
description: A sleek, upright white and black electronic console with multiple ports, a disc slot, and Xbox branding. The design is modern with perforated ventilation and a mix of matte and textured finishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows a white face with a perforated lower section and a subtle Xbox logo in the upper right corner.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals multiple connectivity ports including Ethernet, HDMI, USB, and power input.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid black panel with four small feet at the corners for stability.
description_view_3: Left side view features a vertical disc slot, power button, and Xbox logo, highlighting the main user interface.
